description: Parameters for the isolated agent child workflow.

source_directory.description: Source directory path (can be Git repo or regular directory)
source_directory.title: Source Directory

source_branch.description: Source branch name (only used for Git repositories in ACT mode)
source_branch.title: Source Branch

agent_execution_timeout_minutes.description: Timeout in minutes for agent execution. Defaults to 10 minutes.
agent_execution_timeout_minutes.title: Agent Execution Timeout Minutes

output_directory.description: Directory name for agent outputs in analyze mode. Defaults to 'awa-agent-output'.
output_directory.title: Output Directory

title: IsolatedAgentParams
